p0_findings.finding: Committed demo private key / key hygiene
p0_findings.description: A demo Ed25519 private key is tracked in the repository. Tracked demo secrets are unacceptable in any production claim.
p0_findings.roadmap_issue: GL-136 Remove Demo Private Key From Tracking / Add Key Hygiene Gate

p1_findings.description: No committed requirements.txt, pyproject.toml, setup.py, or Pipfile records exact runtime and development dependencies.
A duplicate or redundant check_admin_token stub exists, creating maintenance confusion and auth enforcement divergence risk.
The audit hash-chain computation does not use a write lock. Concurrent writes can break tamper-evident integrity.
p1_findings.roadmap_issue: GL-139 Audit Hash-Chain Write Lock Baseline

p1_findings.description: Single-threaded HTTPServer limits concurrency. ThreadingHTTPServer must not be enabled until GL-139 audit lock is implemented and tested.

p1_findings.finding: Operator model default true and legacy deprecation
p1_findings.description: ENABLE_OPERATOR_MODEL defaults to false. The default must favor the secure path and legacy paths must be scheduled for removal.
p1_findings.roadmap_issue: GL-141 Operator Model Default True / Legacy Deprecation

p1_findings.description: The _read_json utility contains a BytesIO check that exists only to support tests. Production parsing must not contain test-only branches.
p1_findings.roadmap_issue: GL-142 Remove BytesIO Test Hack From _read_json

p2_findings.description: Routing logic is concentrated in a single large server.py file. Should be decomposed into route modules without changing endpoint behavior.

p3_findings.finding: Redis/distributed rate limiter for horizontal scaling
p3_findings.description: The in-memory rate limiter cannot scale across multiple processes or machines. A distributed implementation is future horizontal-scaling work.

corrected_roadmap: GL-136 Remove Demo Private Key From Tracking / Add Key Hygiene Gate
GL-139 Audit Hash-Chain Write Lock Baseline
GL-141 Operator Model Default True / Legacy Deprecation
GL-142 Remove BytesIO Test Hack From _read_json
GL-144 Tenant / Workspace Data Model Design
sequencing_rules: ThreadingHTTPServer must not be enabled before audit hash-chain write locking is implemented and tested (GL-139 before GL-140).
Production SaaS must not be claimed until P0/P1 remediations and tenant/workspace boundaries are implemented.
Full backend suite must use scripts/run-full-backend-suite.sh, not a 120-second-limited wrapper.
explicit_non_goals: no key removal/history rewrite in GL-135
no runtime behavior changes in GL-135
no DB migration or schema change
no dependency additions or version changes
no website, landing page, design, brand, or marketing file changes
no deployment automation, monitoring backend integration, or incident automation
next_issue: GL-136 Remove Demo Private Key From Tracking / Add Key Hygiene Gate
